registers.name: init
registers.comment: 0xBE: init/calibrate. init_sequence emits [0xBE, payload high, payload low] = [0xBE 0x08 0x00]

registers.name: data
registers.comment: Pure-read 7B response — no tx phase before the read. Layout: [status, h_hi, h_mid, h_lo_t_hi, t_mid, t_lo, CRC8]. addr_bytes:0 → engine emits a bare I2cRead(7). crc_stride:7 = single end-of-frame CRC over the 6 preceding data bytes; mismatch fails the whole block read for the cycle (both fields NaN-propagate).

fields.label: Humidity

pre_read.comment: AHT20 measurement trigger — pure 3-byte command, no register addressing. Engine command-form emits exactly [0xAC 0x33 0x00] on the wire.

fields.comment: 20-bit humidity = top 20 bits of bytes 1..3. Read 3 bytes BE → shift right 4 to drop the low nibble (which belongs to temperature) → mask to 20 bits → scale to percent. Chip yields humidity_pct = raw * 100 / 2^20.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.comment: 20-bit temperature = low 20 bits of bytes 3..5. Bytes 3,4,5 BE → mask to 20 bits (drop the high nibble of byte 3, which belongs to humidity) → apply Aosong formula temperature_c = raw * 200 / 2^20 - 50. No pre_read here — the engine reads the data block once per cycle for Humidity (the first field), and Temperature reuses the same block via per-cycle register-reuse machinery.
